title: cayratia triternata
intro: Cayratia triternata, also known as the Five-angled Cayratia or five angled vine, is a type of flowering plant in the grape family (Vitaceae) that is native to Southeast Asia. The plant has been traditionally used in medicine for its various medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties, which make it useful for treating various health issues. The health benefits of Cayratia triternata include reducing fever, alleviating digestive problems, and treating skin conditions such as eczema and acne. In herbal preparations, the leaves and stems of the plant can be used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures that can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
